items.summary: Data centers might have a climate problem. With more than 80% of data centers worldwide in regions at high risk of drought, flooding, or wildfires. primary_item.title: Southbound Stock Connect flows surge to record US$152b driven by Hong Kong’s IPO revival
primary_item.summary:
Southbound Stock Connect flows, through which mainland Chinese investors buy Hong Kong listed shares, hit a record high in the past year, reflecting strong confidence in the city’s market on the back of a booming pipeline of initial public offerings (IPO).
